title: Prema Khaidi
subTitle: Chandram and Neelima, a young couple, face troubles since her father, Bapineedu, does not approve of her choice as he belongs to a poor family.

title: Chandralekha
subTitle: An unemployed man saves a rich woman and takes her to the hospital where her relatives mistake him as her husband. He plays along as he needs money to repay a loan.

title: Masti Majaa
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Calvary Darshanam
subTitle: Calvary Darshanam

title: Hushaaru
subTitle: Four friends from middle-class families decide to live their lives according to their own principles. However, they soon fall into trouble due to personal setbacks.

title: Theri
subTitle: A seemingly ordinary baker leads a tranquil life with his young daughter until thugs threaten her safety, unveiling his hidden past.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

title: Ambajipeta Marriage Band
subTitle: The twins Malli and Padma in the Andhra Pradesh hamlet of Ambajipeta grow up to be accomplished workers as they negotiate relationships and society's expectations.

title: Fidaa
subTitle: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

title: Kadhalikka Neramillai
subTitle: A man falls for his boss' daughter and convinces his friend to pose as his father to gain approval for their marriage, resulting in a hilarious series of misunderstandings.

title: Solo
subTitle: Gautam, an orphan, wishes to marry a woman from a joint family and his dream comes true when he falls in love with Vaishnavi. However, Vaishnavi's father is against their marriage.

title: Aaha..!
subTitle: Sriram, a carefree guy, becomes a scapegoat and takes the blame on himself after he discovers a secret about his elder brother, Raghuram.

title: Masti Majaa
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Calvary Darshanam
subTitle: Calvary Darshanam

title: Silly Fellows
subTitle: In the melee that occurs when MLA Jacket Janaki Ram falls into a coma, two friends, Veerababu and Soori, grapple at the strings that keep everything together.

title: F2: Fun and Frustration
subTitle: Two young men hope to control their wives after their respective marriages. However, their chauvinistic attitude often lands them in hilarious situations.

title: Su From So
subTitle: In the coastal village of Marlur, Ashoka's innocent crush sparks rumours of ghostly possession, creating comedic chaos and unexpected twists.

title: Nuvvu Naaku Nachav
subTitle: Venky, an unemployed youth, heads to Hyderabad for a marriage ceremony. What seems like a brief vacation gradually turns into something more, when the soon-to-be bride falls for him.

title: K-Ramp
subTitle: A rich businessman, Krishna, sends his wayward son, Kumar, to Kerala in order to reform him. There, Kumar falls for Mercy, a girl with PTSD and suicidal tendencies.

title: Atharintiki Daaredi
subTitle: Goutham resolves to reunite his grandfather with Sunanda, his estranged aunt. However, he chooses to pose as a driver to befriend her.

title: Chandrakala
subTitle: A family moves into their ancestral mansion to try to sell it off. However, trouble starts brewing when they experience supernatural phenomena and a ghost mysteriously killing people.

title: Welcome Obama
subTitle: Yashoda agrees to be a surrogate mother to Lucy, an American lady. Unfortunately, during her pregnancy, Yashoda meets with an accident that jeopardises the child's life.

title: Masti Majaa
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Calvary Darshanam
subTitle: Calvary Darshanam

title: Baapu
subTitle: Debt-ridden farmer Mallanna faces an impossible moral dilemma when his wife proposes a shocking solution to their financial crisis.

title: Khaidi No. 150
subTitle: Seenu, a criminal, escapes from the prison and places his doppelganger, Shankar, in his place. However, upon learning about Shankar's noble mission, he takes up the cause himself.

title: Balagam
subTitle: A young man in severe debt believes that the only way to pay it off is through the dowry from his impending marriage. However, the death of his grandfather puts his plan on hold.

title: Bharat Ane Nenu
subTitle: Bharat, a graduate from Oxford, is forced to take up his father's position as the chief minister after his sudden death. He tries to reform the corrupt society but faces obstacles from his enemies.

title: Return Of The Dragon
subTitle: Reeling from a sad breakup, a college student gives up on his studies to commit financial fraud. However, his new endeavour puts him in a difficult spot.

title: Jaya Janaki Nayaka
subTitle: Gagan, a brave young man, is unable to be with Sweety, his true love, due to her parents' disapproval of him. However, he vows to protect her after unknowingly saving her from gangsters.
